name: eip712-clearsign
documentation:
python-eip712
==============

**This library provides tooling for the EIP712 descriptor standard.**

This library implements:
 * Reading and writing EIP712 descriptor files into an object model

functions.name: eip712.utils.get_primary_type
documentation:
Determines the primary type from a given EIP-712 schema.

The primary type is the root type that is not referenced by any other type in the schema,
excluding the "EIP712Domain" type. If there are multiple root types or no root type,
appropriate exceptions are raised.

functions.name: eip712.utils.get_schema_hash
documentation:
Computes the schema hash of an EIP-712 schema.
Schema hash is sha224 of the compact JSON UTF-8 encoded representation of the schema.

functions.name: eip712.utils.get_schemas_by_hash
documentation: Extracts and returns a dictionary of EIP-712 schemas indexed by their hash.

classes.name: eip712.utils.MissingRootTypeError
documentation: Exception raised when a no root type is found.

classes.name: eip712.utils.MultipleRootTypesError
documentation: Exception raised when multiple root types are found.

documentation: Convert an input EIP712 descriptor to a resolved EIP712 descriptor.

methods.name: eip712.convert.resolved_to_instructions.EIP712ResolvedToInstructionsConverter.convert
documentation: Convert a resolved EIP712 descriptor to a dictionary of EIP712 instructions.

methods.name: eip712.EIP712MessageDescriptor.mappers
documentation: Get a list of field mapper for this message.

methods.name: eip712.EIP712MessageDescriptor._schema_top_level_type
documentation:
Given a schema, identify the top level type.

We define it as the first type that is not referenced by fields in other types, excluding "EIP712Domain".

methods.name: eip712.EIP712MessageDescriptor._type_names
documentation: Recursively generate the list of field names to reach an object with a basic type

methods.name: eip712.EIP712MessageDescriptor.from_schema
documentation: Build descriptor automatically from schema.

Descriptor for a single message.

Defines message fields and how we want to display them on device.

classes.name: eip712.EIP712ContractDescriptor

methods.name: eip712.EIP712ContractDescriptor.mappers
documentation: Get a flattened list of all field mappers for all messages.

methods.name: eip712.EIP712ContractDescriptor.add_message
documentation: Add a message to this container.

Descriptor for a single smart contract on a specific network.

Defines messages associated with this contract and how we want to display them on device.

classes.name: eip712.EIP712DAppDescriptor

methods.name: eip712.EIP712DAppDescriptor.mappers
documentation: Get a flattened list of all field mappers for all contracts/messages.

methods.name: eip712.EIP712DAppDescriptor.add_message
documentation: Add a message to this container. If the contract is not already present, it will be added.

Descriptor for a dapp on a specific network.

Defines messages for one or more contracts and how we want to display them on device.

modules.name: eip712.model.base

Base model for library, using pydantic.

See https://docs.pydantic.dev

classes.name: eip712.model.base.Model

methods.name: eip712.model.base.Model.load
documentation:
Load a model from a JSON file.

```
param path

file path

return

validated in-memory representation of model

raises Exception

if the file does not exist or has validation errors
```

methods.name: eip712.model.base.Model.load_or_none
documentation:
Load a model from a JSON file.

```
param path

file path

return

validated in-memory representation of descriptor, or None if file does not exist

raises Exception

if the file has validation errors
```
